title: 2026 Oscar Predictions in Every Category - Deadline
text: Predicted Winner: One Battle After Another. Nominees: Frankenstein, Train Dreams, Sinners, One Battle After Another, Marty Supreme. Prediction Rationale: The article notes that history could be made with not only the first woman, but also first Black woman, to win through cinematographer Autumn Durald Arkapaw for Frankenstein. However, the predictor acknowledges strong competition from Train Dreams, which is described as gorgeous, and from One Battle After Another, which received ASC winner Michael Bauman's expert lensing. The prediction favors One Battle After Another because this award tends to go to the most cinematic, aligning with the Best Picture frontrunner. The article suggests that cinematography often correlates with other technical awards when a film is positioned as the awards season favorite.
